name: East of Tent
description: A narrow clearing east of the tent. Thorny bushes crowd the edges, but a gap in the undergrowth to the east reveals a faint trail heading into the forest.
ambient: Birds chatter somewhere in the distance.

interaction_rules.text: You close your eyes and murmur a quiet prayer. For a heartbeat, the room feels still enough to listen.
Your voice drifts through the area and fades into the distance. No one applauds, but it lifts your spirits.
